title: Dynamic Trees - Quark
description: Compatibility Mod between Dynamic trees and Quark
body: ![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/910/506/quark.png) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net) ## Overview This mod makes Quark compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by it, and fully replacing them during world generation. The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs. ## Features ### New Trees - Fiery Blossom - Frosty Blossom - Serene Blossom - Sunny Blossom - Sweet Blossom - Warm Blossom ### New Mushrooms _(requires [DT+](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus))_ - Glow Shroom ### Quark's Azalea With this addon, azalea trees will have Quark's azalea logs, and will also drop more logs to make them more viable. ### World Gen #### Implemented: - Blossom trees generate sparsely across the world - Azalea trees that generate will have Quark's branches and log drops #### To-Do: - The glimmering weald biome does NOT yet generate with dynamic glow shrooms. (Underground generation is a WIP) ## Other addons Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page. ### Suggestions and Requests To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions). ## Requirements - [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - Optionally, [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) which includes dynamic Glow Shrooms ## License, Permission and Modpacks Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask. This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
